official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound player_combat_end fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official player_combat_end body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns player_combat_end to packet id 0x42.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the player_combat_end id to ClientboundPlayerCombatEndPacket.
The official player_combat_end body is one duration VarInt.
The fixture uses the primitive int constructor and does not require CombatTracker state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded duration, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove combat runtime behavior, entity state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer combat runtime behavior, entity state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
